<!-- What pages are added, updated, or removed? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Front matter is correct (`layout`, `title`, `parent`, `nav_order`)
- [ ] File name is lowercase with hyphens only
- [ ] Code blocks have language tags
- [ ] Internal links use relative paths
- [ ] `last_modified_date` updated to today's date
- [ ] Previewed locally with `bundle exec jekyll serve`
- [ ] No broken links
